# CS7.1 firmware 7.1.260714.6 legacy wire baseline
#
# Bytes are represented with C escapes. Requests exclude transport timing.
# Responses are exact: spaces, case, spelling, JSON order, and LF are normative.

[startup]
request=<reset>
response=Ready\n

[inspection]
request=ping\n
response=\x20ok\n
request=version\n
response=7.1.260714.6\n
request=getconfig\n
response={"FeedMotorSpeed":90,"FeedCycleSteps":70,"SortMotorSpeed":90,"SortSteps":20,"NotificationDelay":90,"SlotDropDelay":400,"AirDropEnabled":0,"AirDropPostDelay":0,"AirDropPreDelay":30,"AirDropSignalTime":50,"FeedHomingOffset":3,"SortHomingOffset":0,"AutoMotorStandbyTimeout":60,"DebounceTimeout":300,"DebouncePauseTime":500}\n

[negotiation-on-old-firmware]
request=protocol:2?\n
response=ok\n
request=protocol:2\n
response=ok\n

[framing]
request=\n
response=ok\n
request=ping\r\n
response=\x20ok\n
request=<41 printable bytes>\n
response=error:command too long\n
request=pi\x00ng\n
response=error:invalid command\n

[setters-valid]
request=feedspeed:90\n
response=ok\n
request=feedsteps:70\n
response=ok\n
request=feedhomingoffset:3\n
response=ok\n
request=sortspeed:90\n
response=ok\n
request=sortsteps:20\n
response=ok\n
request=sorthomingoffset:0\n
response=ok\n
request=slotcount:8\n
response=ok\n
request=notificationdelay:90\n
response=ok\n
request=slotdropdelay:400\n
response=ok\n
request=automotorstandbytimeout:60\n
response=ok\n
request=debounceTimeout:300\n
response=ok\n
request=debounceTime:500\n
response=ok\n
request=airdropenabled:false\n
response=ok\n
request=airdroppredelay:30\n
response=ok\n
request=airdroppostdelay:0\n
response=ok\n
request=airdropdsignalduration:50\n
response=ok\n
request=cameraledlevel:78\n
response=ok\n

[setters-invalid]
request=feedspeed:0\n
response=error:invalid feedspeed\n
request=feedsteps:1001\n
response=error:invalid feedsteps\n
request=feedhomingoffset:201\n
response=error:invalid feedhomingoffset\n
request=sortspeed:101\n
response=error:invalid sortspeed\n
request=sortsteps:0\n
response=error:invalid sortsteps\n
request=sorthomingoffset:201\n
response=error:invalid sorthomingoffset\n
request=slotcount:0\n
response=error:invalid slotcount\n
request=notificationdelay:-1\n
response=error:invalid notificationdelay\n
request=slotdropdelay:-1\n
response=error:invalid slotdropdelay\n
request=automotorstandbytimeout:4294968\n
response=error:invalid automotorstandbytimeout\n
request=debounceTimeout:-1\n
response=error:invalid debounceTimeout\n
request=debounceTime:-1\n
response=error:invalid debounceTime\n
request=airdropenabled:yes\n
response=error:invalid airdropenabled\n
request=airdroppredelay:-1\n
response=error:invalid airdroppredelay\n
request=airdroppostdelay:-1\n
response=error:invalid airdroppostdelay\n
request=airdropdsignalduration:-1\n
response=error:invalid airdropdsignalduration\n
request=cameraledlevel:not-a-number\n
response=error:invalid cameraledlevel\n

[commands]
precondition=running
request=homefeeder\n
response=ok\n
request=homesorter\n
response=ok\n
request=sortto:3\n
response=ok\n
request=test:1\n
response=testing started\n
request=sorttest:1\n
response=testing started\n
request=stop\n
response=stopped\n

[commands-invalid]
request=3x\n
response=error:invalid slot\n
request=xf:3x\n
response=error:invalid xf\n
request=sortto:3x\n
response=error:invalid sortto\n
request=test:-1\n
response=error:invalid test\n
request=sorttest:-1\n
response=error:invalid sorttest\n
request=unknown\n
response=ok\n

[state-and-queue]
precondition=not-homed
request=3\n
response=error:not homed\n
precondition=busy-with-one-pending-command
request=version\n
response=error:busy\n
precondition=running,queue=(0,0)
request=1\n
response=<none until physical feed completion>,done\n
postcondition=queue=(0,1)
request=1\n
response=<none until physical feed completion>,done\n
postcondition=queue=(1,1)

[progress-and-fault]
precondition=feed-request-waiting-for-material
response=waiting for brass\n
maximum-rate=1 line per second
precondition=feed-home-search-exceeds-threshold
response=error:feed overtravel detected\n
